_comment: Base Rowboat config template. deploy-client.sh writes the live .env with real values. The llm-router sidecar routes gemini-* traffic to Google and llama*/qwen* traffic to Ollama, so a single Rowboat can run both agents below.

agents.description: Primary agent for inbound SMS. Handles greetings, FAQs, and lead qualification. Ollama-backed for cost and latency.

Proxy agent for voice tool calls originating from the Telnyx <-> Gemini Live media bridge. Runs on Gemini so it can reason over the full vault and emit structured tool invocations. The bridge calls this agent's /chat endpoint; Rowboat in turn posts to the platform Next.js /api/voice/tools/* adapters for Nango / Telnyx / CRM work.
Catch-all for SMS-initiated delegations (CRM updates, browser searches). Uses the SMS tier Ollama model so we don't burn Gemini tokens on background work.

llm_router.note: Internal docker-compose service alias. llm-router forwards gemini-* to Google's OpenAI-compat endpoint and everything else to Ollama on the host.

voice.note: Inbound PSTN voice is handled by Supabase Edge (Telnyx webhooks) and the VPS media bridge. The bridge posts tool calls to /api/voice/tools/* on the platform; Rowboat's voice_task agent is available as a fallback when a tool response needs additional reasoning.
